description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent black gable roof and a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements. The front is adorned with a wide porch, lush landscaping, and a pathway leading to the entrance, flanked by manicured hedges and trees. A glass-roofed sunroom or greenhouse is attached to one side, providing a bright, airy extension to the main living space. The rear of the property includes a large green lawn and additional garden structures, while the side reveals a driveway and a secondary entrance. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large panes facing the garden and smaller, grouped windows on the sides. The overall design blends open green spaces with functional living areas, making it ideal for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a black gable roof, wide porch, glass sunroom, and lush landscaped gardens, featuring asymmetrical window arrangements and modern-traditional styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide porch, manicured hedges, and the glass-roofed sunroom to the right.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the garden, greenhouse, and the driveway with a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, the glass sunroom, and the extensive green lawn.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear lawn, garden structures, and the back of the main building with visible rooflines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and large garden-facing panes
